questions.question: Почему 'UI для production secrets' — anti-pattern?

options.text: No version history (UI overwrite silent), no code review/PR, manual = error-prone, no env separation, single Fernet key — единый point of failure. Production: IaC (Terraform) + Secrets Backend

questions.explanation: UI anti-pattern для prod причины: (1) Нет git history — никто не знает кто и когда менял. (2) Нет PR review — bypass approval workflow. (3) Manual copy-paste = typos, screenshot leaks, шаринг через chat. (4) Easy to put prod secret в dev cluster accidentally. (5) Fernet key — single point of encryption failure. Production path: Terraform resource (vault_kv_secret_v2 / aws_secretsmanager_secret) с secret value из CI variable. Git PR + reviewers + CI/CD apply. Каждый change = audited, reviewable, reproducible. UI OK для: local dev, isolated testing, one-off emergency overrides (с post-incident audit).

questions.question: Compromised credentials response time target?

options.text: < 15 минут до revoke compromised key. Fast revocation > complete forensics first. AWS: deactivate IAM key. Vault: vault token revoke / vault lease revoke. DB: ALTER USER PASSWORD. Forensics после, не до

questions.explanation: Compromised secret → time-to-revoke critical. Каждая минута = potential additional damage. Target < 15 min. Sequence: (1) Detection (GitGuardian / GuardDuty / report) → (2) Confirm compromise (CloudTrail на suspicious activity) → (3) **Revoke immediately** (deactivate key, не delete — leave for forensics) → (4) Deploy new credentials в Vault/SM → (5) Force Airflow refresh (cache invalidate or pod restart). Forensics, write-up, post-mortem делаете AFTER. Не ждите perfect understanding для acting. Long-term prevention: pre-commit hooks (gitleaks/detect-secrets), IRSA/WI вместо long-lived keys, secret scanning в CI, training.

questions.question: Rotation cadence — какой стандарт для production?

options.text: Fernet key: quarterly. Static DB passwords: quarterly. Vault dynamic secrets: per-task (1h TTL automatic). Third-party API tokens: annually. Cloud IAM keys: never use long-lived — use IRSA/WI/MI. Testing rotation quarterly в staging

questions.explanation: Industry standard rotation policies: Fernet key — 90 days с rolling multi-key window. Static DB passwords — 90 days, ideally automated через Vault rotation or AWS rotation Lambda. Vault dynamic creds — per-task (TTL 1h-24h depending workload). Third-party tokens — annually + при departures. **Cloud IAM keys** — DON'T use long-lived. Always IRSA (EKS) / Workload Identity (GKE) / Managed Identity (AKS). Critical: test rotation quarterly в staging (dry-run playbook) — если staging падает, fix процедуру ДО production attempt. Production rotation = reactive incident if not tested.

questions.question: Vault outage с auto-failover misconfig — immediate fix: kubectl rollout restart airflow pods чтобы invalidate in-memory secret cache и подхватить promoted standby.
questions.explanation: После Vault primary failover на standby — Airflow в running pods может cache stale credentials или have stale Vault token. use_cache → in-memory cache TTL может задержать switchover. Forced rollout: kubectl rollout restart deployment/airflow-scheduler -n airflow + workers + triggerer. Каждый new pod re-auth-ится с Vault, начинает с empty cache. Это speeds recovery с 'wait for TTL expire' (10 min default) до 'as fast as pods restart' (1-3 min). Trade-off — running tasks могут быть disrupted, но это лучше чем full outage. Long-term: fix auto-failover config так, чтобы standby promotes automatically на primary failure, проверьте quarterly в staging.
